summary: The user is developing a software product and is focused on prioritizing tasks to achieve a minimum viable product (MVP) for pilot customers. They recently had a breakthrough on May 15th and are considering alpha testing with a small group of friends, family, and potential customers before the official launch.
facts: The user is working on a software product and aims to get a minimum viable product (MVP) out to pilot customers. The user had a breakthrough on product development on May 15th. The user is struggling to find the right team members to help with development. The user plans to finish implementing core features, set up the database, design the user interface, and figure out the payment gateway for their product. The user needs to finalize the pricing model and create a sales page on their website. The user is considering using Stripe as the payment gateway for their product. The user plans to recruit a small group of friends and family familiar with the industry for alpha testing. The user intends to reach out to potential customers who have expressed interest in their product for feedback during alpha testing. The user is considering whether to have a formal agreement or a simple email explaining the purpose of the alpha test for their testers.
